calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing; (Motions)
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for request for Default Judgment against Defendant Daniel P Binet.

Dept:505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Petrucci; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:10:32 a.m. and concluding at 9:19:45 a.m.(D505)

Jonathan Vaknin, Esq. specially appearing for and on behalf of plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Daniel P Binet not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract filed Aug-18-2022.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant served on Mar-15-2023; service effectuated on Mar-27-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant on Jun-26-2023.

Counsel to summarize the causes of actions and to provide offer of proof.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: statements evidencing the account
Exhibit B: statement account of last payment
Exhibit C: statement account of balance due

Court compares the prayer in the complaint to the proof and reads into the record the amounts.
Counsel requests to move exhibits as evidence.
Court grants the request and takes judicial notice.

After reviewing the declarations, considering all the evidence, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has met their prima facie case and rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo, N.A. and against Defendant Daniel P Binet as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant the following:

Damages $26,164.77
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $800.00
Costs $510.00

Proposed Judgment signed and executed this day.
